children.text: Adjustment of water right charges as final adjudication on projects and divisions named
The adjustments under sections 1 to 40, inclusive, of the Act of Congress of

children.tail: , 44 Statutes 636, are declared to be an incident of the operation of the “reclamation law,” a final adjudication on the projects and divisions named in such sections under the authority contained in
, be construed to be the basis of reimbursement to the “reclamation fund” from the general fund of the Treasury or by the diversion to the “reclamation fund” of revenue of the United States not on
, required by law to be credited to such “reclamation fund.”

children.text: Sections 1 to 40 of the Act of

children.tail: , referred to in text, are not classified to the Code.

children.text: The reclamation law, referred to in text, probably means

children.tail: , as amended, popularly known as the Reclamation Act, which is classified generally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under
